message:
⚠️ CWE-915 OWASP:A01-Broken CVSS:9.8 | Object injection/Prototype pollution (incl. model/tool outputs) | MEDIUM [SOC2,PCI-DSS,ISO27001]
   Fix: Use Map or property whitelisting | https://portswigger.net/web-security/prototype-pollution

🔒 CWE-311 OWASP:A04-Cryptographic CVSS:7.5 | Detect HTTP resources in HTTPS pages detected - Literal containing http:// in HTTPS context | MEDIUM
   Fix: Review and apply secure practices | https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/311.html

⚠️ CWE-319 OWASP:A02-Cryptographic CVSS:5.3 | HTTP URL detected: "http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml" | MEDIUM
   Fix: Use HTTPS or add to allowedHosts config | https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/319.html

🔒 CWE-502 OWASP:A08-Software CVSS:9.8 | eval() used for deserialization (code execution vulnerability) | CRITICAL
   Fix: Use JSON.parse() or safe deserialization libraries | https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/502.html

🔒 CWE-502 OWASP:A08-Software CVSS:9.8 | eval() used for deserialization (code execution vulnerability) | CRITICAL
   Fix: Use JSON.parse() or safe deserialization libraries | https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/502.html

🔒 CWE-770 | Resource allocation inside loop without limits | HIGH
   Fix: Move resource allocation outside loop or add iteration limits | https://cwe.mitre.org/data/definitions/770.html
